spec.precondition: requires valid(ctx) && valid(buft) && valid(nbytes_total) && ggml_get_no_alloc(ctx) == true
spec.postcondition: ensures (result == null(result) || valid(result)) && *nbytes_total >= 0 && (no_alloc implies result == null(result)) && (!no_alloc && result != null(result) implies result represents a backend buffer allocated for tensors in ctx from buffer type buft)
